{{Quote|A vicious Zabrak admiral by the name of Grot. We have a small team of commandos available that will gas the building to drive the admiral out. I'm pretty sure that he will send his goons out first and not come out until he doesn't have a choice. So come prepared for a battle.|Captain Voldez to a Rebel|<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>}}
'''Voldez''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She participated in the [[Battle of Restuss]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Voldez was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
